title: More Satisfying
description: A modpack that aims to make Minecraft more satisfying. Based off of AsianHalfSquat's "Making Minecraft As Satisfying as Possible With Mods" series.
body:
![The logo for the modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fba9ca7cace4280eafce8c6ec708d76aa0866644.png)
This modpack aims to improve the Minecraft experience by making it more satisfying as laid out by AsianHalfSquat in his "Making Minecraft As Satisfying As Possible With Mods" and "Making Minecraft As Satisfying As Possible With Mods 2.0" videos.

There will is both a client side and server side version of this modpack. The server side includes all the mods (server and client side) while the client version will only include the mods marked as "client" on their Modrinth page.

I have also included the Mod Menu mod for easier config access despite it not appearing in either of the videos. I have also decided upon Terra, as it is the most vanilla friendly though, if you want to use either Terra, Terralith or some other terrain generation, feel free to edit it.

For more optifine parity I have included Reeses's Sodium Options and Sodium Extra.

## USE AT OWN RISK!
While the client version will only have client side mods, this does not mean it will be allowed/work on every server. Check with an admin or owner before using it on a server to make sure you are allowed. I am not responsible for any bans, kicks or other punishments that you may recieve from using this modpack on a server.

## Credit
- AsianHalfSquat [https://www.youtube.com/@AsianHalfSquat/featured](https://www.youtube.com/@AsianHalfSquat/featured)
